sutta: monks these 5 fears in the way which have not yet arisen will arise in the future be you fully awake for them and being awake strive to get rid of them what 5 monks there will be in the long road of the future monks who have not made body become that is not developed body not made moral conduct become not made mind become not made wisdom become and those who have not made this becoming will cause the ordination of others and verily they will not be able to lead them in the way of higher moral conduct higher mind higher wisdom and they too will become monks who have not made body become not made moral conduct become not made mind become what made wisdom become and those who have not made this becoming will cause the ordination of others and verily they will not be able to lead them in the way of higher moral conduct higher mind higher wisdom and they too will become monks who have not made body become not made moral conduct become not made mind become not made wisdom become thus verily monks from dhamma comes corrupt discipline vinaya from corrupt discipline corrupt dhamma monks this is the first fear in the way which though not yet arisen will arise in the future be you fully awake for it and being awake strive to get rid of it again monks monks who have not made this becoming will give will teach others and verily they will not be able to lead them in the way of higher moral conduct higher mind higher wisdom and those 2 who have not made this becoming will teach others and will not be able to lead them in the way of higher moral conduct higher mind higher wisdom thus thoroughly monks from corrupt dharma comes corrupt discipline from corrupt discipline corrupt dhamma monks this is the second fear in the way again monks monks who have not made this becoming when giving a talk on the higher dharma abhidharma will not be fully awake to the meaning but will enter on a state of darkness thus verily monks from corrupt dhamma comes corrupt disciplined from corrupt discipline corrupt dhamma monks this is the third fear in the way again monks who have not made this becoming will not listen will not give a ready ear will not want to understand or deem such things should be recited and mastered when those discourses suit sutas spoken by the tata gata d profound and meaning transcending the world concerning emptiness are recited but those discourses of poets mere poems just a short words and phrases alien the utterances of disciples to these when recited they will listen will give a ready ear for 1 to understand and deem such things should be recited and mastered thus indeed monks from corrupt dharma comes corrupt discipline from corrupt discipline corrupt dharma monks this is the fourth fear in the way moreover monks there will be in the long road of the future monks who have not made body moral conduct mind or wisdom become and those elders who have not made this becoming will become luxurious lags crime movers in back sliding shorting the burden of the secluded life and they will put forth no effort to attain the unattained to master the unmastered to realize the unrealized and those who come after them will fall into their views and they too will become luxurious legs prime movers in backsliding shirking the burden of the secluded life so
commentary: this suta is a very interesting sutra about the 5 fears the buddha asks us to be careful of in the future the first 1 is that a monk who has not developed body virtue mind and wisdom will ordain others the second 1 he has not developed these qualities he will give guidance to others will become acharya a teacher in thailand they call an achar to others and uh this is uh something the buddha said we have to be careful of i mean look into the vinaya books and the buddha in the early years asked the monks to attain liberation before they teach others and later because the arahants were getting less and less the buddha relaxed the rules and eventually the buddha said that monk cannot ordain others and cannot give out guidance or teach others unless they have cultivated themselves for 10 years 10 years was the minimum time among was expected to practice and the first 5 years he was supposed to live with his teacher and get proper guidance that's according to the vinaya a monk has to either live with his upajaya his preceptor or live with an acharya a teacher for 5 years and during these 5 years he gets the benefit of the experience of his teacher or preceptor his proper guidance in the sutas the vinaya and also meditation etc so after 5 years if you wanted to he could go and live alone practice alone for another 5 years and then having 10 years of experience behind him then only he can give guidance to others and this was the minimum standard set in the vinaya but even then sometimes some monks don't follow the standard after they wear the rope for a short while they start taking disciples or they start giving guidance to others or ordain but ordination nowadays generally they they don't ordain because nowadays especially in the buddhist countries you have certain guidelines given but still some people some monks they take disciples too early so this was a warning the buddha gave that a manga should cultivate himself before he teach others and the third 1 is talking about abhidharma but the abhidharma in the suttas does not refer to the abhidharma pitaka that we now have the abhi the higher dharma and the sutas if you look through the sutas it is reference to the higher teachings and the higher teachings in the sutas generally refers to the teachings that can get us out of samsara and in particular the 37 bodhi pakiya dharmas the aryan eightfold path the 7 bojangas factors of enlightenment the 5 faculties the 5 powers the fourth sati patana etc etc so [Music] so when a manga wants to give a talk on the higher dharma then he should understand otherwise and the buddha said you enter on the state of darkness and then the fourth 1 the fourth 1 is an interesting 1 because here the buddha said in the future in the future those discourses those tasks of the buddha people do not want to listen to them will not want to give a ready ear will not want to understand or deem that such things should be recited and mastered those and they said and those suta spoken by the buddha deep profound in meaning transcending the world concerning emptiness these people don't want to listen but those teachings of disciples they would want to listen and meaning teachings of among disciples and also later books which are other than the sutras people take an interest to them whereas the buddha here is saying that the discourses that teachings that we want to study should be the buddha's discourses and this is very clear here and we should always remember in the maha parinibana when the buddha was about to pass away he was asked now that the teacher is going to nibana who should we take as our teacher and the buddha said take the dhamma vinaya as your teacher our teacher is always the dhamma vinaya always remember that and the dhamma in the nikaya is defined as the sutas that's the sutas and the vinaya of course concerns only monks so we must be very familiar with the discourses and the suitors of the discourses of the buddha before we practice otherwise we will go on the wrong step and then take us many years before we realize that we've gone on the wrong step and then the last 1 the buddha is talking about monks who become luxurious and take the lead in backsliding shocking the burden of the secluded life making no effort to attain the unattained to mastery and master to realize the unrealized and when they do that their disciples will also follow their views will also become like that and they'll make no effort to get out of sansara and if you remember 1 of the earlier sutas i read the buddha said if a person wears the rope and he does not cultivate practice to get out of samsara that means he does not practice the 3 factors of silas ahmadi panya moral conduct concentration and wisdom then the buddha said he is not among even though you as the rule so it is very important for among to always remember that the purpose of wearing the rope is to practice to get out of suffering now the next utah is
